head_commit.message: Reject unsupported `clone` calls under ptrace
Block flaky gVisor epoll_pwait2 timeout test

Cleanups for ptrace implementation

1. Enforce `check_ptrace_stopped` is called with the `TraceeState` lock
   guard held.
2. Make `ptrace_stop` on all arches to take the parameter `user_ctx:
   &mut UserContext`, to avoid multi-line arguments at call sites.
3. Enforce three states for the ptrace-stop signal info: `UnWaited`,
   `Waited`, and `None`.
4. Some minor style corrections.
